title: Kidney, spatial transcriptomics, male, Alport, nicotinamide riboside

ml_recommendations.rationale: Lower dimensionality than single-cell. Elastic-net regularisation handles collinear gene expression well. SVM with RBF kernel often competitive. DE gene pre-selection still beneficial.

Spatial coordinates add a graph-based feature dimension. Graph neural networks (GNN) can incorporate neighbor information. For simpler baselines, XGB on spatially DE genes with neighbourhood composition features.
